auth_notes: Requires creating a 'Private App' or 'Public App' in the SurveyMonkey Developer Portal to obtain a Client ID and Client Secret. Supports Bearer Token authentication via OAuth2 flow.
rate_limits: Standard limit is 500 requests per day for free accounts; 120 requests per minute burst limit. Paid plans offer significantly higher limits.
gotchas: Webhooks require a paid subscription (Standard plan or higher).
The 'responses/bulk' endpoint is necessary to avoid N+1 request issues when fetching full survey answers.
Access tokens are long-lived, but the initial OAuth handshake must be configured manually in n8n's HTTP Request node credentials.
research_notes: Implementation will rely on the HTTP Request node. Users should configure 'OAuth2' credentials in n8n. Because there is no native trigger, the user must either use a Cron/Schedule node to poll the bulk responses endpoint or manually register a webhook via a one-time POST request to the /webhooks endpoint pointing to an n8n Webhook node URL.

effort_recommendation.rationale: Implementation will rely on the HTTP Request node. Users should configure 'OAuth2' credentials in n8n. Because there is no native trigger, the user must either use a Cron/Schedule node to poll the bulk responses endpoint or manually register a webhook via a one-time POST request to the /webhooks endpoint pointing to an n8n Webhook node URL.
